data.description:
## Incident Overview

tests/.../test-check-referential-integrity.sh fails when run via validate.sh / test-batched.sh.

## Symptom
check-referential-integrity.sh exits zero when broken reference present

## Reproduction
bash tests/[hooks|scripts|integration]/test-check-referential-integrity.sh

## Context
Discovered while running validate.sh --ci to unblock scripts/release.sh.
CI on origin/main is GREEN. After fix 7225-7708 (bash-runner.sh honors
SUITE_TEST_INDEX RED markers), the failure remains because no RED marker
exists for these specific function-level failures.
data.title: [test-check-referential-integrity.sh]: pre-existing failure -> validate.sh --ci flagged
